calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett A. Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University of San Francisco.
Raymond Rogers, the Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ronald J. Miranda.
Default was entered against defendant on November 20, 2008. Amended Default was entered against defendant on March 16, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff University of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Ronald J. Miranda as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,211.38.
Prejudgment Interest - $16,650.66.
Attorney's Fees - $3,334.00.
Costs - $475.00,
Late Fees - $18.69, for a total judgment in the amount of $52,689.73.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
